query_normalized: the effect of sensory deprivation on dream recall and bizarreness psychology
rationale: The paper focuses on automated sleep staging algorithms for Parkinson's disease and REM sleep behavior disorder, which is an off-domain application of sleep technology that does not measure the psychological constructs of dream recall, dream bizarreness, or the effects of sensory deprivation. While it involves sleep (REM), it lacks any connection to the specific independent variable (sensory deprivation) or dependent variables (dream content metrics) required by the user's question, failing all
